rationale: Educ. Code §8.002 establishes the purpose of regional education service centers. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) does not conflict with this provision.
quote:
Regional education service centers shall:
(1) assist school districts in improving student performance in each region of the system;
(2) enable school districts to operate more efficiently and economically; and
(3) implement initiatives assigned by the legislature or the commissioner.
_note: No direct conflict. The rule addresses ESC purpose, not property tax exemptions or school funding mechanics.
